description_long: This is a modern, portable water cooler with a cylindrical body and a flat, oval-shaped top. The main body is dark gray, while the top and handle are white, giving it a clean, contemporary appearance. The front features a transparent vertical water level indicator with measurement markings and a digital display at the bottom, as well as a single push-button spout for dispensing water. The top panel includes a small digital control interface with several buttons and indicator lights, likely for temperature and dispensing controls. The handle is robust and arches over the top, making the cooler easy to carry. The back and sides are plain, with a small power socket visible near the base.
description: A portable, cylindrical water cooler with a white top, handle, and digital control panel, featuring a front water level indicator and push-button spout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the water level indicator, digital display, push-button spout, and control panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain dark gray body and the arched white handle, with minimal visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the handle, a latch or hinge, and a small power socket near the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the handle and plain body with no additional features.
attribute_dispenser_spout_type: push-button spout integrated into the front panel
attribute_control_panel_design: Compact digital control panel with a small display, several push buttons, and indicator lights arranged on the top surface.
